attributes.description: Backend pool latency, status, and AGW-vs-backend latency split for Azure Application Gateway.
attributes.panelsJSON:
[{"type":"markdown","embeddableConfig":{"content":"## [Azure Application Gateway OTel] Backend Health

Backend pool health and AGW vs backend latency split.
- Backend status code mix and 5xx volume
- AGW total latency vs backend-only latency (gateway overhead)
- Per-pool latency percentiles and request distribution
- AGW-only failures (no backend status code present)
- Top AGW reason codes
